title: Senior SEO Specialist at Pepperfry Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Senior SEO Specialist at Pepperfry Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Pepperfry Consulting Pvt Ltd. We are on the lookout for a dedicated SEO Specialist to strengthen our Hyderabad-based team.

About Pepperfry Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Pepperfry Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pepperfry Consulting Pvt Ltd!
